Case Studies

Three companies.
Three different problems.
One approach.

Every engagement starts with an AI-native GTM audit. What follows is specific to the business — no templates, no copy-paste strategies.

Company names and identifying details anonymized for confidentiality
B2B SaaS / $8M ARR / Austin, TX
The Problem

A fast-growing SaaS company at $8M ARR with a strong product and a broken top-of-funnel. The sales team was generating pipeline manually — every rep doing their own outreach, no shared playbook, no repeatable motion. The CMO seat had been vacant for seven months. Leadership knew they needed a system, not another hire.

What We Did

Ran a full AI-native GTM audit to identify leverage points, then implemented a Claude-powered outbound engine and content system — sequencing, ICP messaging, weekly content output. Stepped in as fractional CMO for eight months to run the system, iterate, and build the playbook the next hire would inherit.

The Results
3.1x pipeline volume within six months
$2.4M new ARR generated in the engagement period
8 mo. to hire full-time CMO with a working playbook already in hand
Professional Services / $14M Revenue / Remote
The Problem

A professional services firm doing $14M in revenue — entirely referral-dependent, with no marketing infrastructure to speak of. They wanted to expand into a new vertical but had no system for reaching net-new buyers. Proposals were taking 6–10 hours each. The team was stretched, and growth felt like it required hiring they weren't ready for.

What We Did

Implemented Claude across their proposal workflow, client reporting, and content output — cutting hours-per-proposal dramatically. Simultaneously built the GTM strategy and outbound infrastructure for the new vertical: ICP definition, messaging, sequence build, and launch plan. Used the ongoing retainer to optimize through launch.

The Results
60% reduction in time spent per proposal
11 wks from kickoff to new vertical launch
4 qualified inbound leads in the first month after launch
E-Commerce & Wholesale / $22M Revenue / DTC
The Problem

A DTC brand doing $22M across direct and wholesale channels with a marketing team of two — doing the work of eight. AI was in the mix but ad hoc: different tools, inconsistent outputs, no shared system. Team morale was suffering. Content was a bottleneck. Email was underperforming relative to their list size.

What We Did

Ran a full Claude implementation across every marketing function: email campaign production, content calendar, performance reporting, and a customer service response library. Monthly optimization retainer to build new workflows and track results quarter over quarter.

The Results
14 hrs per week reclaimed per team member
4x content output without adding headcount
22% lift in email-attributed revenue within 90 days
How It Works

Three phases.
One continuous system.

Every engagement follows the same architecture — adapted to your business, not templated. See the full breakdown on the services page.

01
Audit

We map your current GTM motion — what's working, what's broken, and where AI creates immediate leverage. You leave with a prioritized implementation plan, a baseline for measuring results, and clarity on what the next 90 days should look like. You can act on it with us or on your own.

AI Readiness Audit →
02
Build

We implement Claude workflows inside your actual business — configured with your brand voice, your product context, your team's SOPs. Outbound systems, content engines, reporting automation, proposal workflows. Real work, not demos. Measured against the baselines we set in the audit.

Claude Implementation →
03
Optimize

GTM systems degrade if they're not tended. The retainer keeps your implementation current — new workflows as your business evolves, monthly performance reviews, and ongoing strategic guidance from someone who knows your numbers. This is where the compounding starts.

Ongoing Retainer →
What Our Clients Say

Specific. Measurable.
Not agency-speak.

"

We'd been talking about building a real outbound motion for two years. Bill had the infrastructure running in six weeks and we had our first SQLs from it in week eight. The ROI on the engagement paid for itself before month four.

CEO, B2B SaaS
$8M ARR · Austin, TX
"

I've never had a tool change the way I work the way this did. I'm not just faster — I'm producing things I wouldn't have had the bandwidth to attempt before. Content, reporting, strategy docs. It doesn't feel like AI anymore, it just feels like how we work.

Director of Marketing, Professional Services
$14M Revenue · Remote
"

Every agency we'd worked with before gave us a deck and disappeared. Bill built things. He sat in our Slack, he knew our customers, and when we said something wasn't working, it was fixed the next week. That's a completely different relationship than what we were used to.

Founder, E-Commerce Brand
$22M Revenue · DTC

Want Results
Like These?

We start with an audit. You leave with a plan — whether we work together or not.

The audit identifies exactly where your GTM system is leaking, what AI can fix first, and what 90-day velocity looks like for your business. It's the same starting point for every client in these case studies.
